implementationTarget.allowedMutationRoot: new local repository plus generated test temporary directories only
forbiddenMutationRoots: real Codex, Claude, CC Switch, or other Agent configuration
existing repositories other than the current governance evidence transaction
Hooks, accounts, credentials, and external services

evidenceStatement: The owner delegated the optimal stack choice and authorized necessary installation. Combined with the prior implementation direction and accepted topology and slug, this authorizes only the new local repository and disposable-root foundation slice; it does not authorize real Agent writes, existing-repository integrations, commit, remote creation, or push.
